specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive's employees were found to have failed the internal email phishing simulation orchestrated by the cybersecurity team in 2025?
answer: It was determined that 24% of Elexion Automotive employees fell victim to the internally orchestrated email phishing simulation from the Elexion Automotive cybersecurity team in 2025.
